subject: Create skill file structure and frontmatter
description:
Create the create-skill skill file in Generic Agent Skills (agentskills.io) format with proper structure and frontmatter.

Set up:
- Skill file with correct GAS frontmatter (name, description, version, author, triggers, etc.)
- Top-level document structure with placeholder sections for all major components
- Skill description that clearly communicates what the skill does and when to invoke it
- Trigger patterns for skill invocation (e.g., "create a skill", "new skill", "generate skill file")

The skill file should be named appropriately and placed in the project's skill output location.

**Acceptance Criteria:**

_Functional:_
- [ ] Skill file created with valid GAS-format frontmatter
- [ ] Name set to "create-skill"
- [ ] Description clearly explains the meta-skill purpose
- [ ] Trigger patterns cover common invocation phrases
- [ ] Document structure includes placeholder sections for all pipeline stages

_Edge Cases:_
- [ ] Frontmatter fields match latest GAS spec requirements

_Error Handling:_
- [ ] File path validated before writing

**Testing Requirements:**
• Manual: Verify frontmatter conforms to GAS specification
• Manual: Verify trigger patterns match expected invocation phrases

Source: internal/specs/create-skill-SPEC.md Sections 5.1, 6.2
activeForm: Creating skill file structure and frontmatter
